steps.title: Identify like terms
steps.content: Both $12ab$ and $6ab$ contain the same variables raised to the same powers, so they are like terms and can be combined.

steps.title: Combine coefficients
steps.content: Subtract the coefficients of the like terms: $$12ab - 6ab = (12 - 6)ab = 6ab$$ That matches choice D — D is correct.
